taskPreset.title: Create Normal Session
taskPreset.description: Start a normal chat session through the shared preset flow with repository, vault, and project-reference context.

panel.projectHint: The normal session will be created in the selected project.
panel.taskNameHint: Optional. Leave empty to let the title be optimized from the first message.
panel.taskNamePlaceholder: Help me review the backend session flow
panel.repositoryAccessHint: Optionally select writable and read-only repositories that should define the session boundary.
panel.repositoryAccessEmpty: No repositories are available for the selected project yet.
panel.referenceVaultsHint: Optionally attach vaults as reference-only context for notes, snippets, or previous explorations.
panel.vaultEmptyDescription: Register a vault first if this session should reuse vault context.
panel.projectReferencesHint: Optionally attach related projects as reference context for this normal session.
panel.inputLabel: What do you want to do? *
panel.inputHint: Describe the task, question, or direction for the normal chat session. The run is non-interactive, so include the important context here.
panel.inputPlaceholder: Inspect the current session creation flow, summarize the normal-session preset wiring, and make reasonable assumptions when details are missing.
